\tzpentry{ID11375}{FQT Metric Tensor-Sum Carrier}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The FQT metric carrier is expressed as a tensor-indexed sum of Fisher, quantum, and topological metric components.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
g^{\mathrm{FQT}}_{ij}=\sum_{k,l,m,n}g^{\mathrm{Fisher}}_{ij}\otimes g^{\mathrm{Quantum}}_{kl}\otimes g^{\mathrm{Topological}}_{mn}
